text:

Log:
  MFH: r398425

  - Update to 5.33
  - Resolves the obnoxious startup message issue [1]
  - Add options NLS and XFT
  - Convert to USES=autoreconf
  - Don't install pam file when PAM option is disabled
  - Regenerate patches
